Review Title: Happy to have discovered Wine Spies!
Review Content: I had a question on a shipment and Agent Moscato responded to my online request in only a few minutes. The agent quickly corrected my shipping date to mid-September, as I am in ATL and didn’t want my wine traveling through the heat in July. Since I began ordering from WS in February, I have been impressed with the quality and value of the wines they offer and the shipping options are unparalleled.  You can buy only one bottle at a time (or as many as you like) and WS will hold your wine until you have amassed a full case. The wine is shipped free of charge and climate controlled shipping is also offered at no additional cost.  Wine Spies has a FaceBook group page for their members (there is no fee to join WS) and they are active participants in discussions of wines purchased from them.  I have learned so much about wines from around the globe from the other members, as well as from the detailed descriptions that WS includes with each offering.  In addition to flavor profiles, the backgrounds of the wine maker and vineyards are also included in the write-ups.  They find hidden gems from boutique wineries in California and beyond as well as well-known wines and offer all at discounted prices. I’m very pleased with all aspects of my Wine Spies experience. Thanks, Agent Moscato, for your kind and prompt support!

Review Title: Wine Spies is a terrific source of wines and wine info
Review Content: Wine Spies has been a terrific source for wine and wine information for years. Their business model is the best. They send out daily offers of very diverse wines ("New" and "Old" World wines), usually backed by authoritative expert reviews, at very diverse costs. A customer may add wines to their own personal "locker" (i.e., a 12-bottle case), one or more bottles at a time, and store it at their temperature-controlled facility until one wants it shipped at no additional cost. They'll hold up to two "lockers" for quite a while until you've got what you want to ship. Wine Spies has access to a lot of famous as well as little-known and hard-to-get wines, always at a substantial discount off the original list price. I've never been able to beat their price with a market price charged by other online retailers--who will still charge an additional substantial shipping charge to get your hands on the bottle(s). Their "agents" provide outstanding customer service in the event of a problem. I have particularly enjoyed working with "Agent Shiraz" over several years, always great service. No fee charged to check it out.

Review Content: I have been buying wine from the Wine Spies for well over 10 years. They have become my trusted source for wine to the point where I no longer have wine club memberships. And free shipping and the lowest prices anywhere never hurts either. When you purchase us much wine as I have it is inevitable that you will occasionally get a tainted bottle. When I do I simply open a ticket and the issue is usually resolved in a matter of hours. Their Customer Service is headed by an associate named Agent Malbec. He wrote the book on customer service. We have never had an issue that couldn't be resolved quickly and in a courteous manner. I appreciate him so much I looked up his boss on LinkdedIn just so I could tell him what a great job Agent Malbec and all his employees do or us.

Review Title: First Time Experience with Wine Spies
Review Content: My first order with Wine Spies was fraught with problems: original wine was canceled by the winery and our order was switched to a new wine. That wine was delivered to our house while we were out of town instead of the UPS Store we instructed them to deliver. The wine sat outside because the GSO driver signed my name indicating I received it. A second shipment was sent to the UPS Store and Wine Spies recalled the first shipment without notifying us and we had UPS at our doorstep picking up wine without our knowledge. Such a disaster should not earn 5 stars but in the end Wine Spies went out of their way to make sure I was taken care of. Without me asking, they refunded my money, issued credits to my account and added some wine to my locker. That is going above and beyond the call of duty and they recaptured (wine spy lingo) a lost customer and perhaps now have a customer for life. Way to save the day, Agent Crush. Wine Spies went from 1 star to 5 stars.

It would still be an improvement to customer service if they had a live body to cal particularly in cases such as mine where the wine is shipped to the wrong address and time is of the essence.

I have been a member of wine spies for several years, the selection is amazing and the prices are even better. If you enjoy wine at a great price, then give them a shot. Your will be a member for life.

I really enjoy ordering wine from Wine Spies. In general, the wine selections are very high quality and the deals are great! I also like the wine locker option so that one can ship their orders when convenient and also just by a couple of bottles of something and build a case. Shipping in cardboard instead of Styrofoam is also a plus because it can be recycled. I do wish they would have more old world European selections, especially dry Alsatian Rieslings. There are too many overpriced Napa cabs for my personal tastes. Once in a while, WS will pitch a wine as a great deal when one can actually find it at the same price or less. They often give the retail price as sold from the winery, but that is often a very high price and not a "real" price. I usually google the wines for pricing and other reviews and am sometimes annoyed that it can be found cheaper elsewhere. I expect WS to offer the best pricing which it usually does, but not always.
Great service!! Excellent prices and extra ordinary wines . They are most helpful when problems occur and free shipping a big plus.. great company - keep up the good work, wines and prices..
Quality product at extremely affordable prices.

An unforeseen technology gremlin played havoc on a recent shipment from my locker. Went to the wrong address... contacted Agent Malbec and in less than 24 hours the problem was resolved and all of the locker curated wines were reshipped.  Great service from a great team. Thanks and we will continue to be a loyal operative.

I have nothing bad to say aboutWine Spies. I feel prices are fair and the service quality is great.  Been ordering from them since 2011, never an issue. My last order was short, one bottle from my lockers and they expressed that one bottle refrigerated in a 2 day. The only issue I have is one my locker is ready to ship, they sometimes forget to send shipping information but I email and they get right back with me. 😀🍷

Review Title: I have been a client of Wine Spies…
Review Content: I have been a client of Wine Spies since 2011 and have purchased hundreds of bottles of wine from them. My purchase experience has always been superb, and they will continue to be my go-to for my wine purchases.

Review Title: The fact that WineSpies offer great…
Review Content: The fact that WineSpies offer great wine opportunities at very good pricing is an obvious plus. I ordered 2 bottles of wine that just weren't good, contacted Wine Spies, and was given a full refund. They ABSOLUTELY support their "agents"!!!

Review Title: This Company is a Scam and Lies Incessantly
Review Content: In relation to my review, the company claims that I gave them the wrong address and was disrespectful. All of their accusations are a complete lie. I changed my delivery address IN their system 4 weeks before I initiated shipment and I have screenshots from their company personnel admitting fault. I also attempted to assist them by trying to re-route the shipment but was unable to because FedEx policy enables only the shipper to do that. I asked them why they didn’t just change the address mid-route and the employee lazily told me “we are unable to” when they just didn’t want to. I then let them just re-ship the wines when they got them instead of demanding a refund because I act in good faith but they decided to deliberately go radio silent and steal with the excuse of “punishment.” The people who work there are jokers and burnouts. To date, they have yet to refund me all of the money across my 4 different accounts and only did so because of my previous scathing review and because they have to save face. All of the above is present in text messages and will easily be furnished. I have no choice but to have my personal attorney sue them for both monetary damages and defamation.

Review Title: This Company is Run by THIEVES
Review Content: These guys are thieves. I am a fairly large customer. They sent a bunch of wines to the wrong address, got the wines back and refuse to give me several thousand dollars of money back and keep closing tickets. No customer service, no one picking up their “office phone” and they keep closing tickets I open up for this. It smells like they’re going bankrupt very soon. Buyer beware

I have been a customer for about 4 years. I have never had any problem with the shipments. However, my recent wine shipment was damaged during the shipping process. I contacted the agents and a new replacement shipment was sent. The entire replacement took about 2 weeks. Very pleased with the service and products.

Beyond great wine values, Winespies customer service is great too! Recently, I had an issue with a shipment that was compromised due to cold weather. Although it wasnt their fault (I forgot to ship temp controlled), they couldn't have been more understanding and applied a credit to the order. Their customer service team is first rate (Agent Malbec).
Wine Spies customer service resolved a delivery issue I had quickly and without question. It is that kind of service that makes one comfortable to buy from a company. I recommend them highly.

Review Title: I just had my 20th case delivered
Review Content: I just had my 20th case delivered. My husband will tell you that I have a buying problem (which I say is better than a drinking problem!), but Wine Spies makes it so easy! I love discovering the gems to add to my cellar. They do all the hard work - I just click the buy button, adding 2 or 3 bottles at a time until my locker is full. Then it ships for free! I have found so many new loves as well as stocked up when old favorites come around.  So, I’ve loved Wine Spies for a few years now. But…they say you don’t know how great a company is until there is a problem and you see how they handle it. I had an issue with my recent delivery where the final mile delivery company left the case in a vehicle for days in single digit weather. By the time I received it, the corks had popped and the wine was ruined. Even though it was no fault on the Wine Spies end, they immediately took care of it. No complaints, no hassle. I was a loyal customer before, but now it’s written in stone. Looking forward to my next 20 cases!

Review Title: Wine Spies is not the first wine…
Review Content: Wine Spies is not the first wine supplier that I've been involved with, but it is much better than the others. They allow me to purchase a few bottles at a time, at very good prices, and once I've purchased a case, they ship it FREE! I've been extremely happy with the quality of the wine as well as the service!

Bought several wines and used their “locker” system to keep the wines with them for future shipping. When I requested shipment it took them weeks to get back to me and say they had an “inventory issue” and would offer a replacement wine. Then, they changed their mind and replaced 1 bottle and refunded me another before, supposedly, shipping the wine. Over a month later and after numerous emails sent by me, they came back and said they did not know where the wine was… I, obviously, don’t want to have any business dealings with a company like that so I requested refund of all items not shipped yet but, so far, they only offered partial refund. I am still giving it the benefit of the doubt that they’ll make it right but, for the time being, beware of potential issues dealing with them.

Review Title: I created a locker and had it shipped…
Review Content: I created a locker and had it shipped late last year (2023). It came after about 2 weeks. I have only consumed two bottles so far. One was very good, the other did not live up to expectations. It was relegated to a cooking wine. 50% so far.

The wine picks by Wine Spies are great, as they sometimes feature well known wines at a good price, but often (more often, in fact) introduce us to some good and interesting wines that we would not otherwise have known about. The ability to select the wines we want as they appear on the app, but not ship them (for free) until we're ready is great, and it is one of the things that sets Wine Spies apart from similar online wine buying experiences.

Review Title: Some of the wine I bought was clearly…
Review Content: Some of the wine I bought was clearly past it's prime. Specifically The Bonny Doon Cigar Volant 2015. My wife and I have been a member of the Bonny Doon wine club since the 90's and know that wine well and so far 2 consecutive bottles have been bad. seems like money wasted. it was undrinkable, and don't like pouring money literally down the drain.

Here's the "good"? This outfit (which apparently is a first cousin to lastbottlewines.com) offers from time to time a great wine that is not available here in the backwards state of Ohio (the 13th & 3rd from Turtle Rock comes to mind). So, that's a plus. Now the flip side.  The last order I made with these people took an ASTOUNDING 26 days to arrive on my front porch. I had expected the case of wine to go out the door immediately, as the hot weather was fast approaching. I could've placed the 12 bottles on a dolly and reached northern Ohio quicker than that. E-mails asking about the order go unanswered, because these guys have already got your money.  As a result, I wouldn't waste any more of my time if these folks were offering DRC at $25/per. In closing, if you enjoy off-the-beaten path wineries and don't mind waiting weeks and weeks and weeks for your order to arrive, then this is the outfit for you. I'll pass.......

My favorite online wine retailer. The build your own case and then get it shipped free is the best way to explore quality wines of different varietals from all over the world. Great customer service, easy to use app, and terrific shipping. Highly recommend you check them out. Cheers!

Review Title: Wine selections are varied and fun
Review Content: Wine selections are varied and fun, especially the lesser known vintners The Napa, Sonoma and Washington State AVA’s are really great! The delivery system is greatly improved in terms of length of time to receive wine after ordering

Review Title: Great place to buy your wine!
Review Content: I have been doing business with Wine Spies for several years and have never regretted it. I have also referred them to several friends and they all thank me. Great place to buy your wine!
Great selections and great prices

Review Title: Great wines at a great price
Review Content: Great wines at a great price. We have enjoyed almost every wine we have bought.
Never disappointed with great selections.

Review Title: The ability to fill a locker over time…
Review Content: The ability to fill a locker over time is a really good option.
Interesting wines at discounted prices. Love the ability to store up to 24 bottles with them before having to ship.

Review Title: The purchases are saved and you can…
Review Content: The purchases are saved and you can always go and look at the review later on. Great prices and great selection. It has brought me back to Napa Cabs which had gotten too pricey for me.

Review Title: A MUST for any wine lover!
Review Content: First of all it's fun to get an email and/or text every day with the "deal of the day! BUT... it's even better that the offerings are always great wines at really great prices.  Ive been in the restaurant/bar industry since college, I was a wine representative for a bit and also ran a wine program that received the Wine Spectator Award of excellence for 11 years in a row, so its safe to say that I have some wine knowledge and... that I LOVE WINE! Wine Spies has unbelievable deals and.. the fact that i can build lockers up to a full case in order to get free shipping is simply amazing... and genius!! Any time I buy from Wine Spies it's a simple, quick process and I would absolutely recommend this site to everyone!!!!

Review Title: Wine Spies always delivery quality wines at bargain prices
Review Content: Wine Spies consistently provides excellent wines at reasonable prices with strong customer service. I've been buying from them for 20 years and have never purchased a dud wine or had any poor experiences (dozens of purchases). A pleasure to do business with them!

Review Title: I've purchased various bottles I must…
Review Content: I've purchased various bottles I must say they have been 85% on point with reviews and recommendations.
Spies provide exceptional variety and value in wines. The operatives give me access to stellar producers not available in my local market. The customer service has been very good.
I have been a member for years and buy on a regular basis. Great deals, service and overall, the best site to buy wine.

Review Title: Excellent selection of wines offered at…
Review Content: Excellent selection of wines offered at incredible prices. Great website and customer service. Love their shipping membership. One of the best online wine stores. Creative and clever marketing.
Great deals, lots of different wine varietals to please anyone. Love they will hold a case and mail it for free! Huge!
The reviews are very accurate and the prices are extremely competitive. Great place for a very tempting variety.
Wine Spies offers such persistently high quality wines, often from producers of which I am unfamiliar, that I buy more than I could possibly consume but my prospects are perpetually wonderful.

Review Title: Great pricing and the lockers are convenient…
Review Content: Great pricing and love the daily deal emails. The fact that you can store two lockers before shipping is a huge plus.

Been happily buying from here for years  Lockers are great - can slowly accumulate different wines and take advantage of free shipping  Only supply to east coast of Random Ridge  (Great / boutique Mt Veeder wine that is very well priced - worth it alone for that) But once it is gone, it’s gone

Review Title: Love the overall experience of wine spy's
Review Content: Love the overall experience of wine spy's . The wine values are fantastic, storing my purchases in The climate controlled lockers and the free Shipping on a case of wine make wine spy's my favorite place to purchase wines!

Review Title: Best online wine site hands down!
Review Content: My favorite site to buy wine from! Informative, well written, attention grabbing, and the best deals on the best wines! I've learned so much about wine, the different regions, and the winemakers themselves from WineSpies!

Curated wine! I love the daily wine offerings with detailed descriptions about the wine and winemakers - this is a great way to learn about new varietals and regions. The information about retail price and offering price are so useful and, of course, who doesn't love a bargain? I buy and enjoy so much more wine now with the reduced prices and free shipping!
Great company. Best prices on quality wines

Wine Spies works hard to find wines of great value and at amazing prices. Their DAILY email is so welcome and their ‘store’ although small is full of value. More than fair prices and prompt delivery of purchased wine also marks the valued work of Wine Spies.

Review Title: Fantastic company for a variety of…
Review Content: Fantastic company for a variety of wines. Shipping is easy and quick, if you purchase 12 bottles, it's free!

Review Title: i enjoy all aspects of Wine Spies
Review Content: i enjoy all aspects of Wine Spies, the very best products for the very best prices. It doesnt get better then that.

We love Wine Spies and buy most of our wine from them. Actually, let me take that back: we hate Wine Spies because they make it difficult to buy wine anywhere else at retail price....we just can't do it anymore - not when WineSpies has such amazing prices. We also hate them because I have bought way too much wine over the past couple of years since joining them. They get excellent wine at crazy prices. They store it for you until you're ready to ship it. What more could you want?

Review Title: Wine Spies is great at telling the story!
Review Content: Wine Spies does a great job of communicating their deals and telling a story about that specific wine. I buy the preponderance of my wine from wine spies at least 60-70% mostly because of price and the introduction to boutique wines many times. My only real complaint is I NEED MORE PINOT!
Consistently offering great wines and crazy good prices. The locker system is a game changer. Operative for life.

Review Title: Frequent good deals on really good wines
Review Content: Frequent good deals on really good wines

Review Title: One of my favorite places to buy wine
Review Content: One of my favorite places to buy wine. Good value and I love the locker system

Review Title: The good (wine selections), the bad (packaging/shipping), the ugly (customer service)
Review Content: Wine Spies procures very good wines at very fair price points. Unfortunately, customer service, packaging and shipping has degraded tremendously in the past year. To the point of deterring purchases. Up until a year ago, I recommended WS to my friends & clients... now I am hesitant to do so for fear of poor customer service reflecting back on me.
Great variety of wines at discount prices. I've had nothing but positive experiences using Wine Spies

Review Title: Great wine at even better prices
Review Content: Great wine at even better prices. No shipping pressure as you get to fill a locker at your leisure is the best of all!

Love The Wine Spies! I have not been disappointed with a single purchase. Wine descriptions are on point, so I can trust I will like the wine if I am unfamiliar with the winery. The locker option is perfect so I can purchase as wines pop up appealing to me until I have a case that ships for free. Such a fun and great way to keep my 'wine cellar' .. ok, wine rack filled and try new wines.
On time delivery. Easy to use web site.

Review Title: Always surprised by what Wines Spies…
Review Content: Always surprised by what Wines Spies will bring me each day! Sometimes it’s a no brainer and just push the buy button and sometimes it takes a bit and I learn a lot. Bottom line is I’ve experienced some of the best and most exciting wines because of Wine Spies and wouldn’t change a thing!

Review Title: Member for years and had just one…
Review Content: Member for years and had just one disappointing wine in 100s I have purchased! Got to try wine I never would have!
Lots of great wine, at a variety of price points. Love the locker storage idea, allows me to try lots of new wines without the shipping costs.
Great prices. Ability to locker purchases until you have accumulated a case for free shipping is a huge plus. Downsides are limited quantities and (for me) a lot of highly rated but unfamilar labels.
Great selection and execution

Review Title: The Wine Spies is my source for wine
Review Content: The Wine Spies is my source for carefully curated wine selections. It really takes the hit-and-miss out of wine buying. I’ve been getting wines from them for over 10 years. This one was for the Random Ridge Cabernet Sauvignon, which I have bought many vintages of. It’s always a deep and yet fruit forward and ready to drink on delivery.

Review Title: Wine Buying and Learning Made Easy!!
Review Content: Information about wine is excellent. Website and App are easy to use and follow.

Very fun page that at times has tremendous deals on some very unique wines, often from great winemakers.  My only criticism is that it feels like sometimes the selection is a little heavy on hedonistic domestic wines. Would love to see a little more Mendocino reds, and unoaked old world whites, especially from Spain and Italy.  For the most part, France is well represented.  In general though my experience is very positive and I have recommended Wine Spies to other wine lovers. Cheers

Review Title: Excellent wine selection from a variety of vineyards
Review Content: Enjoy the excellent variety of wine selections along with the favorable pricing. Excellent selection with good descriptions of each wine.

Review Title: Great variety of wines as good to…
Review Content: Great variety of wines as good to really good prices. Web site works well and I have lockers shipped once they get full and that is always a treat when it arrives.

Review Title: Wine Spies - a good experience for me.
Review Content: Wine Spies always offers a wide variety of wines on a routine basis. It is easy to order from W.S., store the selections in a "locker" and have the whole locker shipped at once. Prices are always good. Various promotions occur keeping me checking out the W.S. page every day. Have been with them for a few years and expect to stay with them.  BG - Michigan
Great deals, great service! Been ordering from Wine Spies for close to 10 years!

Review Title: Fun Way to Find New Wine
Review Content: I have had fun trying new wines and have found a couple of wineries I consistently like everthing they produce. I'm not a collector, or high end buyer, though they have lots for those who are. But they also have lots of midrange wines to try. And the best part is you can add them to your locker, slowly fill it up overtime, and when you have a full case, shipping is free.
Great way to try many new wines at a great price! Better than a wine club!
Great deals on fabulous wine
Wine at great prices with lots of variety. I recently had an error on an order and they corrected it within 30 minutes! Great customer service compared to almost any other website!
Excellent variety, particularly of California wine.

Review Title: I have been buying from Wine Spies for…
Review Content: I have been buying from Wine Spies for a while and have had nothing but good experiences with them. Love the Wine Locker program. It gives one time to save wine and build the case with the assortment they like. Once a case is assembled it's free shipping!

Well, to start with, it's the variety of wine (love it), so many choices, so many great wines, and reasonably priced. No matter though, one can find their price-point sooner or later. And they've improved their shipping times.
I view the wine spies special each day and most are far better values than I can find on my own. When I need wine or see a wine I want, I order it. This service is fantastic.
The locker option works well. Customer service is great. Selection and pricing keeps me coming back.

Review Title: You guys run legit specials on legit…
Review Content: You guys run legit specials on legit wines (along with a few over-hyped no-names), with customer service that is above and beyond. I almost penalized you a star for your over-exuberance on some rather ordinary juice, but then I figured you’re just doing your jobs. In your shoes, I would probably do the same thing!
good information and good choices

Review Title: Great variety of wine at good prices
Review Content: Great variety of wine at good prices! It’s always fun to try a new wine you’ve never tried or even heard of before!

Review Title: WineSpies will help you build a diverse cellar.
Review Content: I was a little apprehensive to try Wine Spies at first- because I thought it was too good to be true- however when a friend recommended it I tried it out and now after several cases I’m hooked. They offer incredible small production wines from all over the globe at super affordable prices. The wines come with free shipping once you accumulate a case There are both well known and unknown producers - and i have not been disappointed.

I have been a member of Wine Spies for three years or longer. Probably buy the equivalent of 6 cases or more of wine every year. I have been very satisfied with the prices offered by Wine Spies as well as delivery. I recommended them to several friends and they are happy as well. I could not recommend them highly enough.
They make experiencing new wines, particularly those that are highly rated obtainable at a reasonable price. Cheers!

Review Title: A varied selection of attractive wines…
Review Content: A varied selection of attractive wines with technical information and BIG is the ability to accumulate wines in our locker for shipment later.

Review Title: Great Wines at a Great Price
Review Content: The variety of wines are excellent with great value. I especially like the convenience of your wine locker. Free shipping on a case of wine is also a great incentive.

Review Title: Why I Buy at Wine Spies
Review Content: I enjoy the Wine Spies write ups and special finds. Selection has been good with a variety of price points. I particularly like building a case in my locker.

Review Title: YOU FINALLY GOT THE PROGRAM WORKING SO…
Review Content: YOU FINALLY GOT THE PROGRAM WORKING SO THAT US OLD GUYS CAN QUICKLY NAVIGATE THE ROCESS

Review Title: I appreciate the accuracy of the…incredible values!
Review Content: I appreciate the accuracy of the descriptions. No fluff, simply substance!

I really like the idea of having a vault or two. Along with this you get free shipping and that is a big plus. Delivery is good and sometimes ice packs are used. I would like to see more high end wines offered and some smaller winery offers from places like Nicolini or Watson vineyard.
Great wines @ great prices 🍷
easy ordering. great values love the locker option
Amazing selection of wines. Incredible customer service. And prices that are unbeatable.
Good prices and good offerings.
I’m happy with the service

Have been a customer of Wine Spies for, I think, as long as they have existed. Learned a lot about new wines that have now become old favorites. Great wines at a most reasonable price. Not cheap wines, but good wines cheap.

Enjoy the daily selection of new wines. Like the ease of purchasing and shipping full lockers at No Charge! Wines always arrive in the proper condition. Been purchasing wines from WS for at least two years now.
Great products fabulous prices
I love the locker system

Review Title: You do what you say and you say what…
Review Content: You do what you say and you say what you do. Good products, good prices. Nice variety.

Review Title: I've been buying from wine spies for…
Review Content: I've been buying from wine spies for years. Great wines at great prices. The only time I had an issue it was quickly resolved to my satisfaction.
Best deals in the business, no obligations, good tax advantages, free shipping, an awesome selection. Issues, while very few, have been resolved within 24hrs with good communication.

Review Title: A great way to explore new tastes!great wines
Review Content: great wines - locker system to collect a case and then ship for free is ideal, good info on the wines offered allowing intelligent selections, and very accurate and prompt customer service for any issue/question!!!

The variety, quality and prices of the wines are good. I verify the price with other vendors and if it's a good deal, I buy it. Shipping is fast and free when you have 12 bottles in the cellar. I highly recommend Wine Spies

Review Title: With Wine Spies you get to drink great wine
Review Content: With Wine Spies you get the opportunity to purchase great wines at great prices.  Wines you can't find in stores.

I love reading the reviews and write-ups about the wines. Very insightful and helpful in determining how many bottles to order. And being able to shop in the "store" helps to fill a case. Wine Spies makes it fun to buy wine.
Easy transactions, free locker shipping. Nice!
A really fantastic operation. Wine Spies has become my “go-to” for outstanding wines at bargain prices. Customer service has been above and beyond. Keep up the good work!

Review Title: I liked your offerings but the best…
Review Content: I liked your offerings but the best named wines are usually gone by the time I hear about them . Some of the wines were overrated too . Price is not all I care about , it just has to be great wines ......
Excellent selection of wines, with clear reviews and descriptions. Prepaid shipping costs make is easy to order and receive wine.

Review Title: Wine Spies Does a Fantastic Job...
Review Content: The wines featured are excellent! Sometimes, the discounted price is not as good a deal as advertised but other times the deals are OUTSTANDING! I always check before I purchase. The wine locker is an excellent feature and has allowed me to build customized mixed cases. The ratings are very helpful but I have found that James Suckling's ratings are usually 3-4 points higher than other raters for the same wine. The frequency of the communication is fine. I really like the ability to look back at purchases and see if there is any additional inventory available.

Review Title: The wines curated are really really…
Review Content: The wines curated are really really good and the prices are extraordinary. Shipping is fast and well packed. I love the app.
Web site is great , not enough well known wine , shipping to slow

Review Title: Exceptionally good wines and great prices…
Review Content: I have been a very happy and satisfied member of the Wine Spies community for several years now. I have referred numerous friends to the Wine Spies and they have sampled my purchases and were also very pleased. Wine Spies offers delicious wines at exceptionally good prices. The only negative statement I can offer of the Wine Spies is that the temptation is too great to constantly order more wines and my wife (who happily consumes the greater amount of it) tells me we are running out of places to store it. My daughter also appreciates the wines she receives from us when I order extra. The Wine Spies organization also offers fantastic customer service if they are ever needed.
I’ve been a wine spies operative for many years. I love trying new wines! Their prices are reasonable, and the locker is a great feature if you don’t need or want a whole case of anything.

Review Title: Good Wine Prices - So So Customer Service
Review Content: The deals are generally good. The customer service has room for improvement. Reponses to issues are very slow. A good place to start is to return phone calls and follow up timely.
I love the ability to build a case/locker and ship it for free. It's honestly the reason that your website is the only wine site like this that I buy wine from.

Review Title: Great way to explore new wines
Review Content: Great way to explore new wines. Accumulate a case bottle by bottle if you like, and have it shipped for free when filled. New wines available daily. Website is easy to use. Love it!

Review Title: Reviews received are honest and pretty…
Review Content: Reviews received are honest and pretty entertaining....my orders have arrived on time or early....all good
Great selection and flexible shipping options

Review Title: Lots of rotating unique wines and the…
Review Content: Lots of rotating unique wines and the locker function allows someone on a budget to slowly buy bottles while still taking advantage of free case shipping.

Review Title: I love the deals and the locker program.
Review Content: I love the deals and the locker program.

Review Title: Great options and prices .. wonderful wines
Review Content: I have been purchasing from Wine Spies for several years. Their wines are very reasonably priced; the service of storing until there is a full case is especially worthwhile allowing for variety of wines.

Review Title: Wine Spies always delivers a great…
Review Content: Wine Spies always delivers a great experience! Wonderful wines at great prices!

Review Title: Great deals on Wine and Fun - Highly Recommend
Review Content: I’ve been buying wine with Wine Spies for almost 2 years and I love it. A daily email with a good to great wine, usually well-discounted. I can do some research if it’s a wine I’m unfamiliar with and then I can either buy or not and wait for the next email. Fun way to learn about new wines and get great deals. I especially like their Locker system where they will store your wine until you accumulate 12 bottles and then ship for free. And they have special sales from time to time, often on higher-end wines. I’ve only had to reach out to customer service twice and each time they responded promptly and immediately resolved the issue to my satisfaction. I highly recommend Wine Spies.

Review Title: I buy from a number of different online…
Review Content: I buy from a number of different online wine stores and Winespies is my favorite. Unlike other sites, they personally taste the few wines being offered unlike other sites that just sell a lot of wines - too many to taste really. Their prices are usually less than other sites. Their ability to store your purchased wines until a case is accumulated to get free shipping is a big benefit and not offered by many other sites.

Review Title: I had a truly wonderful experience as…
Review Content: I had a truly wonderful experience as an operative of Wine Spies. Keep up the good work, with uncovering good wines at great prices!

Review Title: Good reviews with lots of information
Review Content: Good reviews with lots of information. Huge variety of wines from all over. Easy to navigate web site. Outstanding value! Convenient buying & shipping procedures. Brief one-day buying window (good). Convenient storage locker while building up a case to ship. Very pleased to work with you.

Well Curated and Reliable. I like the wide variety of wines available even if they tend to lean heavily on the regions closest to them. We have stopped buying wines at the stores, relying on Wine Spies for both our everyday drinking wines and special event treats. Over the last few years we have only received 3 bad bottles, which were immediately credited without question. Keep up the great work.

The variety and various price points for the wines you spy on are great. The website is much improved. The delivery predictability and communication could be improved. Because a 21 yr old is required to sign, schedules need to be adjusted and more visibility into the estimated delivery would be great!

Review Title: Very good selection of high quality…
Review Content: Very good selection of high quality wines. Shipping and packaging need some attention. Final leg is not refrigerated as offered.
Easy process - no shipping cost if you buy 12 bottles over time - good prices on wine - I have bought many cases and I am always pleased with what I have bought - thank you wine spies 🍷
Great wine in affordable prices
Great service and wine options.

While I have used them in prior years and received decent service and decent wines this year has been terrible. My wine has been shipped to the wrong address, the locker has been delayed, and the response to the issue has been merely asking for details on my locker (which they should already have). I don’t want to think this way and hope it can be resolved, at this point it seems like a scam and that they have in essence “taken my money and ran.”

my wines arrived with heat damage- 2 bottles had the corks popped right out of the bottles, 2 had the corks raised out of the bottles by an inch or more and then 2 of the bottles i opened that appeared fine were terrible with heat faults.Clearly storage or shipment problems - when i complained i did receive credit for 3 of the bottles but i later found more bad bottles in the case - they told me i should have asked for refrigerated shipping - yet there was no place for me to ask for that and if you recommend it why don't you ship all your wines that way?

Review Title: WORST CUSTOMER SERVICE EVER... NEVER RECEIVED PRODUCT
Review Content: I placed an order for my locker to be shipped. I started emailing customer support after hearing another for 7 or 8 days. I have continued to text, call and email customer support and have not heard anything. I have asked for a tracking number and the name of the carrier. Nothing..... /there has been no human interaction. DO NOT TRUST this company.

Review Title: Wine Spies is the Real Deal
Review Content: Wine Spies offers terrific and interesting wines, informative and witty reviews and an awesome locker system. The capability of storing up to 2 cases of wine is very clever and is a real differentiator. Shipping is careful, timely and well communicated.

Review Title: Customer service? Do they have anyone working?
Review Content: I am very nervous. I am not getting any traction on shipping my locker. It has been sitting in pending status for over a week now. I reached out to customer service with no response. How can a company have no phone number? It’s only a submitted ticket opportunity and after submitting there is no confirmation email. This seems like a completely virtual business with no customer service hired full time. I have over $500 in wine that is in the land of nowhere. I think I got ripped off and this company will be reported to better business.

Review Title: No wine after shipping 6 weeks ago…
Review Content: I requested locker shipping 6 weeks ago but no wine! Customer service says there was a bug in the system at 4 weeks and shipping in 2 days. 2.5 weeks later, I still don’t have the order.  Terrible customer service and they don’t provide tracking information. Update 10/27/23. First late partial shipment of 6 bottles arrived after 8 weeks. After several emails, the remaining 6 bottles arrived 2 weeks later. Total time was 10 weeks to ship 12 bottles of wine!

Review Title: Great wines and great Customer service.
Review Content: I have been using WineSpies a few years now.  My experience with WineSpies has been fantastic. I try to visit Napa/Sonoma once a year to visit various wineries, taste and buy. WineSpies has featured some great wines from places I know as well as introducing me to some fantastic wines from AVAs I know but wineries that I did not know.  A great feature that they offer is the “Locker” which allows you to buy wine and store with them until you have a full case. Then shipping is free. You control when to ship. If a wine is new to me and the region is good, the writeup is good and the pricing is a real discount I will buy a few bottles, try them and if I like it, go back and put more in the locker. I once received a shipment of some Cabernet where a few bottles had stained labels (probably near a broken bottle in storage). They were still perfectly fine to drink. I reported it to customer service they asked for specifics and pictures. They quickly replaced the bottles and told me to keep the stained sticky ones. That is a CONSUMER CENTRIC organization. I cannot say enough good things about my experiences.

Review Title: I just have a question and I can’t find…
Review Content: I just have a question and I can’t find any way to ask besides this forum! Why do you only have Chardonnay as white wine? There are others you know!!

UPDATED: I did indeed hear from Wine Spies. Good news is the wine hasn't shipped so it's not cooking in a Fedex warehouse. They seem to be on top of it so I'm revising my rating based on their quick and honest response which was very much appreciated.  I would be very careful. I requested they ship my locker 3 weeks ago and there is no tracking or info available that it has shipped on their web site. I have corresponded a few times with 'Agent Blanc' but those responses stopped abruptly. He informed me the wine shipped June 12 with ice packs. It is now June 22 and those ice packs are long gone! Tried calling the phone number and got an answering machine.

I love Wine Spies! Great hidden gems, great prices and the locker feature with free shipping is wonderful. It gives me more time to drink some awesome wine and clear space in my cellar before the next shipment shows up!

Review Title: have ordered from spies for last 3-4…
Review Content: have ordered from spies for last 3-4 yrs, good variety of product at good price points (although recently prices have increased), good service with responses to inquiries and timely shipping, their locker concept is the best idea going

Review Title: Not sure if one of their worker had a…
Review Content: Not sure if one of their worker had a bad day. but good service

I’ve been purchasing wine through Wine Spies for nearly 5 yrs. The daily email (without obligation to buy!) of wine special is fantastic. Wine Spies “store” is full of values. Product selection and price are quite possibly unsurpassed. I’m sure that of my current 60+ bottles of wine, 59 are from Wine Spies.

I used to give ratings on each wine I drank. A star and a checkmark meant top quality. I tired after a long while since very few received less than the top mark...which is pretty remarkable since tastes supposedly vary. Maroon stands out as an extraordinary wine. I also deeply loved the Mira and Cattorasogni, two defitnitely different tastes but both lovely wines...keep up the good job!!🌟👍

Overall experience is positive. Presentation of wine information very helpful to make quick decisions. Only request is to offer more wines that don't peg out as dry. On a scale of 1 to 10, I would like to see some 8s and 9s.

Review Title: Great wines, great value, and really easy!
Review Content: It’s too convenient to receive texts and see a wine from Crown’s Gap. Bottom line is Wine Spies does a great job sourcing wines from around the world! Purchasing and the website are super easy and having the locker setup provides the opportunity to pick favorite and interesting wines over time.

I must express my appreciation to my family for recommending your website to me. Based on my experience thus far, I can confidently say that I look forward to making many more purchases through your platform. The level of service and the quality of products you offer have surpassed my expectations, and I am delighted to be a part of your customer base.

Review Title: Get a phone number to call
Review Content: Get a phone number to call

This was my first experience with The Wine Spies. It has been great to look at their offerings, and slowly build up an order. The “locker” function is great, allowing you to purchase the wines as you go along, until you compile a case for free shipping. I’m looking forward to the arrival of the first case to see the quality of the wines!

Review Title: Good description of product and easy…
Review Content: Good description of product and easy checkout process.

Review Title: Wine Spies does a terrific job of offering selection and of having the wine lockers.
Review Content: Wine Spies does a terrific job of presenting interesting and desirable wines at good prices. Wines from all over the world are offered. Being able to buy 2 or 3 wines at a time and hold them in a locker until a full case is ready for shipping is such a convenience. They offer a range of ship dates when you are ready which is awesome. Highly recommended but be careful its hard to pass up the offers.

Review Title: Some nice wines to be had.
Review Content: Some nice wines to be had on this wine site. Checkout was smooth. Will wait to see how shipment is when I have enough wine to ship

I enjoy Wine Spies immensely! The prices truly are the best (usually) so I have the opportunity to try so many wines and regions that I never would have looked at before. Of course some are more to my taste than others, a good reason to have wine tastings whenever I have friends over to see what everyone thinks. Fun! It’s always a good day when a locker’s worth of my selections show up at my door, free shipping of course. What not give it a try, it doesn’t cost a thing to take a look :-)

Always an interesting choice of the day (& sometimes 2 or 3). Lockers is a game changer for on-line wine purchases. Have seen other on-line wine purveyors copycat the idea. Would love to see you add a Decant time suggestion. It would help those of us still learning this nuances of wine prep & tasting.

Review Title: Some great wines I'd likely not find or…
Review Content: Some great wines I'd likely not find or try otherwise. Checkout is simple and shipment is swift. Can't beat some of the deals.

Review Title: I have purchased wine from Wine Spies for many years.
Review Content: I have purchased wine from Wine Spies for many years. They always have interesting and unique wines and include the "story" behind the vintage, vineyard, and winemaker. The Lockers are a wonderful idea to assemble a shipment especially if you live in a warm weather state. Keep up the good work Agents!

Review Title: Have been buying wine from wine spies…
Review Content: Have been buying wine from wine spies for several years, more than years. Have received excellent wines from them, none of the "two-buck Chuck" wines. Even their "mystery cartons contained excellent wines. They are masters AT GETTING PREMIUM WINES AT GREAT PRICES FOR IT MEMBERS

Great experience. Ordering is easy and there is always a great selection of fabulous wines that you can't find in your local wine shop at great prices. The locker system makes it easy to buy a few bottles here and there and then have it delivered at a better price later. Love Wine Spies!

Review Title: LOVE THE CONCEPT OF THE LOCKERS as I…
Review Content: LOVE THE CONCEPT OF THE LOCKERS as I travel a lot and can only get my purchases when I am back in the U.S. and of course you may encounter some nuggets as you review the offers!!!!!

Wine Spies allows me to buy interesting wines, a few at a time at good prices, and put them into a locker until I have bought a case. Then they ship them to me for free! It takes me months to accumulate a case, and when I get them, it's like Christmas. Yee Haw! A case from Wine Spies arrives.

Review Title: Wine Spies offers some very good small…
Review Content: Wine Spies offers some very good small production wines at a great value. If by chance there is a corked bottle they handle it very well. It is a pleasure to do business with them.

Excellent experience. Love the feature of lockers. The website is easy to navigate, wine is easy to buy. It is all very efficient. I have learned a lot about wine with wine spies and we have bought a lot of great wine from them. I rarely recommend anything but have told all of my friends about winespies.
The locker option is fantastic. Wines options are very good as well. The shipping of the locker got stuck in a back-end system. Hope that gets corrected on future shipments.
Just starting using them, but seems very promising and no issues so far. Fun way to search out good deals on both new and some known wines.

Great computer work! Buying is VERY easy, FAST & accurate. More info available at checkout about the wine & winery. Viewing lockers is fast & easy too and includes pics of what one has purchased. A lot of effort has gone into making it easy, educational and fast for the consumer. Agent Noir (or Red) is a great writer & thus a great salesperson!
I love the locker feature which allows me to buy just one or two bottles at a time.  And as soon as my locker is filled, the case is shipped quickly!

Love the fact I can store in a locker and ship for free with 12 bottles as well Wine Spies has given me the opportunity to try wines I've never heard of. Or would never have tried. I have NEVER been disappointed in a wine that I purchased. All great wines at a very fair price.
Excellent wines. Timely Help from Agents. Ease of storing in lockers. Great prices. We were out of the country for over two months. The agents helped us in receiving the wines upon our arrival

I'm really enjoying Wine Spies. It's shown me wines I wouldn't have known about. It's a fun, no commitment wine club. The only thing to know is to verify if the deal really is a good deal. Most of the time they are but sometimes they're priced the same as other outlets.

I have purchased a few cases of wine from Wine Spies. I am trying wines that I would not have thought of drinking. The prices have been great in most cases. I like the idea of keeping my wines in a locker until I buy the 12. I am not paying for shipping.
Easy to order - wide selection of wine at good prices - have been a member for several years and have always enjoyed the wine I have bought. Recommend

Review Title: I love the idea of the locker for your…
Review Content: I love the idea of the locker for your wine. Buy whenever you want and as many as want and have them saved into your locker. Once you have 12 they are shipped free to you. Lovely wines to choose from and in a huge price range.

Review Title: There was some mix up between Wine…
Review Content: There was some mix up between Wine Spies and their warehouse / shipper 3rd party. Our shipment got lost. I heard nothing about it from WS. I had to contract WS and they got back to me right away telling me shipment was damaged or returned to sender. However I had to contact them at least two more times to get answers about a replacement shipment. WS did not seem to have revised shipping dates correct. I did finally get the shipment, so ultimately it was made right. Otherwise very pleased with WS.

Review Title: Been really Happy with Wine Spies
Review Content: I cannot recall how we learned of Wine Spies, but we have been really happy with them. Have tried a ton of new wines and landed some of our favorites for a great value. Every wine is not an unreal deal, but many are. Have no plans to stop ordering on a regular basis.

Review Title: Fair prices on a wide price range of…
Review Content: Fair prices on a wide price range of wines from all over the world. This is a fine way to build a cellar or just to learn about different wines. We use is as a. Sampling of different wines before locking in on our favorites.

Love the locker option. Nice wine selection at fair pricing - often better prices than the competition! Lots of variability between old world and new world wines, with lots of variety. God spread on pricing from near-cult wines to every day drinkers. No qualms about credits if a bad bottle is delivered. A relatively uncommon experience, but it is wine after all.

Wine Spies allows you to buy a case of individual wines that may be hard to find locally, at a discounted rate. Shipping & customer service have been great as have the quality and value of the wines I’ve sampled thus far.

I have found some really terrific wines at very good prices!! I love the locker system so I can keep my bottles until I reach a case. Cases ship free! Also customer service is amazing. I had a case damaged by UPS and Spies made it right, no questions. I regularly buy from Spies and am very satisfied!

Wine Spies offers some great selections, and their daily deals are usually pretty good! I like that you can keep your wine in a locker until you are ready to have it shipped and that the shipping is free and that they use cardboard and not Styrofoam. They offer predominantly California which is not my favorite, but they also have some great Burgundy, Cote du Rhone and Languedoc offerings. Plus Italian. I bought an amazing Premier Cru Silvaner from Alsace last year and would like to see more Alsatian and German offerings. Overall, I've enjoyed using them over the past year plus.

Review Title: Wine Spies the way to go!
Review Content: We just received the 3rd case of wine that we have ordered through Wine Spies. What we like about Wine Spies, we get to purchase wines from wineries that we have been to and those that we have not been to. We have visited Napa/Sonoma every year since 2010 except 2020 (due to COVID and my husband let his hair grow). We will be back later this year and plan to visit some of the wineries that we purchased wine from through Wine Spies. We think Wine Spies is great!

Review Title: Great way to sample multiple wines
Review Content: The Wine Spies daily deals provide a great way to sample multiple wines at discounted prices, generally items that are not available at your local retailer. The locker concept (waiting until you've purchased 12 bottles before shipping) allows you to mix and match a variety of wines and ship them for free when you're ready - it's great. I'm a fan.

The locker concept is great for varied selection, quantity per selection, and pricing. A recent "surprise" $20 purchase turned out to be a previous bottle offered last summer for $15 (retail $27). I complained about misleading offer and was credited the $20 on my account.

I’ve ordered multiple lockers worth of wine from the wine spies, and I’ll continue to order more. I appreciate the variety of wines they deliver with their flash sales, the writing that accompanies them, and their new app is great. They deliver very good deals on solid wines. If that’s what you’re into, I’d recommend wine spies to you.

Review Title: Winespies is my go-to online wine store
Review Content: Winespies is my go-to online wine store. They bring in a lot of very interesting wines and consistently have the best prices even among their peers, but their biggest differentiator is their locker concept, which allows the consumer to buy wine in whatever quantity and have them hold it until a full case is in the locker, at which time they ship it out for free. The only thing I would like them to improve on is to add an automated email to their auto-shipping process prior to shipping, so if the purchaser needs them to hold off on shipping they can do so. Their competitors do this so no reason that Winespies can't implement a similar feature.

Wine Spies are great! I like that they show me great deals on wine that they have actually tried and recommend. My favorite part is that I can have them hold on to my bottles until I get to a case and it then ships for free. I like to vary things up so I rarely order a case of anything at once so this locker feature is perfect.

Review Title: No one wants to be duped with a wine…
Review Content: No one wants to be duped with a wine club that offloads plonk…. Not the case with WineSpies. My recent shipment was a total success! Great wines and the prices made me feel extra good about the purchases. The locker feature is brilliant. Very satisfied!

Love wine spies, prices are good and it’s a nice blend of unique small operation wineries and more well known ones. Also love the combination of high end and good value finds. Getting access and info to cool old world wines I wouldn’t normally buy has been awesome too.

Wine Spies is the best Great wine at great prices Love the Locker concept which allows you to take some fliers on wines you don’t know, but not over committing. Never had an issue with shipping. Thanks Owen
It's all in the bottles offered! The curated wines are well described, brilliantly selected and value priced. I enjoy learning and tasting based on selections I would not normally know or try.

Review Title: I like the variety of wines offered…
Review Content: I like the variety of wines offered that are not usually found locally.I also utilize the Locker program - great idea! One suggestion: offer more white wines.

The Wine Spies has good prices on their wines, and the fact that you can store up to two lockers with them (12 bottles each) is a great concept. It allows me to select small amounts of different wines and store those wines with them until I am ready to ship a full case for free. I love that concept.

Review Title: Have been with Wine Spies for prob over…3 yrs
Review Content: Have been with Wine Spies for prob over 3 yrs. Now pretty much buy all my wine from Wine Spies (& I keep a constant supply of 37-48 bottles). Selection variety is top shelf. Quality is top shelf. Reviews and discussion on each bottle is spot on. I am a Wine Spies believer!

Review Title: Wine Spies provides Amazing Fine Wine Buys
Review Content: Wine Spies does an excellent job of sourcing limited production high quality wines that they make available at substantial savings. I especially enjoy the NDA offerings. Their Vault option is brilliant and the Vault surprise pick is always an exciting gamble. The information provided on the individual wine is also thoroughly well done. They ship safely and promptly. Learned about them from the WineForNormalPeople podcast. Working on my second shipment with giddy excitement!

Review Title: My experience has been overall POSITIVE
Review Content: My experience has been overall positive. Once I had an issue with a bottle of wine I had purchased and let them know in a survey they did. They responded immediately but didn't tell me that they had issued a credit for the bottle already. The next time I ordered I had a $65 credit to use, which had been the price of the wine, hence my assumption. I was surprised and happy how this issue was handled. Some of the wines were a bit disappointing while other were above expectations, which is why I gave 4 instead of 5 stars.  I hate spending money on shipping (rather spend it on wine), so I do like the concept of the vault/locker.

Review Title: My favorite site for current wines
Review Content: The wines are always well described with solid pro review references, and their emails are entertaining as well. I particularly like that they’ll hold bottles for you until you accumulate a case and qualify for free shipping. Just a wonderful way to buy great wine at a great price.

Review Title: Can't say enough good things about Wine…
Review Content: Can't say enough good things about Wine Spies, superb wines, with full descriptions and professional reviews, at an unbeatable price. Customer Service has always been excellent. The website is easy to use, wine has always come packaged well with no accidents or even any mistakes on orders. The locker feature is the absolute best in that there is no pressure to buy a certain amount of wine to get free shipping, build a case, once you have 12 it ships, for free. First thing I do on my phone every morning is check out the wine spies deal of the day

Wine Spies is a great source to try varietals that we love, from producers who we don’t know, at great prices. Pass a deal, or purchase a deal, its super easy. Love the lockers so we can buy just a bottle at a time and when the case is full, they ship temp controlled to AZ so no more waiting until the Fall to receive wine shipments!
Excellent service and great QPRs...usually about the lowest price in the country. Have purchased dozens of WS products and am impressed with the quality of their curated wines. Highly recommend.

Review Title: I have had a wonderful experience…
Review Content: I have had a wonderful experience purchasing wine through Wine Spies. The wines I typically buy are those that I have never ever purchased before or never heard of. The reviews describing each wine are objective and instructive, and they help me a lot in determining which ones to purchase.

Good information about each wine, fair prices (though not always the best prices), easy to order, and excellent "Locker" benefit. Too many fruit forward California reds are featured for my tastes. I prefer leaner, lower alcohol wines. Among white wines, I like Riesling which I rarely see featured.

Review Title: Interesting wines at good price points
Review Content: Interesting wines at good price points. Good storage options.

We drink a lot of wine and TWS doesn't disappoint. I've had great luck with wines I've purchased as well as through the vault system. I scored a 2016 Arietta H Block for $20! Customer service is quick also once you figure out where to go.

Review Title: Great Wines, Good Bargains, Convenient Storage
Review Content: I love their detailed wine descriptions, the fact that they provide details on the winery and the winemaker's own description of their product. The have great bargains, and the locker features is so convenient. No need to spend hundreds of dollars on shipping alone, or to have to gulp the wines stocked in my small wine fridge to make room for new ones and still know that I have a couple dozen stocked at my Wine Spies Lockers!

Review Title: Gave me credit for a corked bottle
Review Content: Service has always been excellent. One thing that stood out is when I ordered 6 bottles of a $40 wine in February 2019. After trying 4 bottles that were wonderful, I tasted the fifth in August 2022 and discovered it was corked - musty and undrinkable. I contacted The Wine Spies and they promptly gave me credit for the bottle. This shows they stand behind their products.

I've ordered perhaps 6 cases of wines, 1 to 2 bottles at a time from WineSpies over the past 15 months. I love their Locker feature, where you can build up to a locker, and then get it shipped for free when it is full. It gives me a chance to try a wide assortment of wines at reasonable values, and their curated selection of wines means that the largest problem I have is that I could easily blow my entire wine budget just on their site. The wines have always arrived promptly (considering they are shipping the case to the east coast) and in good shape once I click on the Ship this Locker button.
i have to pay when I need to change delivery date. I also wish you would have a few more white selections

Loving this site! Have enjoyed every bottle we’ve bought from winespies! We’ve shared with friends and family and can’t wait to get our next locker shipped! The locker feature is a game changer for our wine purchasing! And ever interaction I’ve had with their staff has been very positive!

Review Title: Great service, but it can always improve...
Review Content: I had three lockers already shipped by Wine Spies. Just had one small problem the last time when the shipment was taking longer to be shipped. I contacted them and the issue was fixed on the same day. The customer service is top notch and all the deliveries were fast and painless. I wouldn't recommend the VAULT feature. Tried twice and the wines were disappointing -the last one was a sparkling from Oregon that seems good, but I don't drink sparkling wines, so it's 20 bucks in the trash for me. Another thing that bothers me is that sometimes the "full price" isn't real and we can find similar offers around the web. I recommend that you run a little online research before buying bottles. Having said that it's a great place to find reasonable cabernet offers and from some gem wineries outside the obvious routes in Napa or Sonoma. I found two of my favorite wineries through entry wines offered on Wine Spies, and I became a huge fan of the Red Hills Lake County AVA after tasting three wines from that place just north of Napa (which saved me some money). I highly recommend the service, the locker feature is great and what makes me come back to them.

Review Title: I have been using wines spies for the past 12 months
Review Content: I have been using wines spies for the past year and LOVE them. I'm about 6-7 cases in and sometimes will purchase 2-3 bottles (if I'm not familiar with the wine) or in some cases have purchased 8-12 bottles if I think it's definitely a home run. Some wines I have enjoyed more than others (kind of an obvious statement) but have not been disappointed in any wines I have purchased. More frequently I am very surprised at the overall value they bring with some high quality juice at very reasonable prices. Holding wine in their "vault" until shipping a full case is also incredibly attractive. Their write-ups are great and I've learned a lot about many winemakers and regions. Would prefer they don't recruit too many more "operatives" to keep some of the daily deals from disappearing too quickly!

Review Title: Unique wine shopping experience with Wine Spies. If you have a good sense of the kinds of wines you like, and are looking for rock-bottom prices on premium wines, this service is terrific.
Review Content: I have been using this service for access to premium wines that normally get a huge markup at your average local wine store. Wine Spies' locker feature seems pretty unique across the industry, allowing you to accumulate wines in drips and drabs until a case is finished. Good for the environment.
Easy, smooth transactions. Love the locker feature. Customer service never been an issue either. Will continue to buy as long as they have wines I like!

Review Title: What a great way to explore the world…
Review Content: What a great way to explore the world of wine. The “Spies” deliver amazing global coverage with prices to make retailers cry. Chilled delivery, ‘lockers’ so you can build up to a case AND shipping is included. When I had a problem (someone at UPS enjoyed my case for XMas) they were on the issue and it was resolved quickly and correctly. Great Cust. Svc all around.

Review Title: I had great difficulty getting my wine
Review Content: I had great difficulty getting my wine from Wine 2 You. I live in Tucson, AZ -- so this is the only way I must get my wine -- apparently. However, they operate from Mesa, AZ (2 1/2 hours away) and only deliver to Tucson on Tuesday and Thursday from 10-2. They will not/cannot deilver to a FedEx or UPS site since they are not affiliated with them. This does not work for me and I have no neighbors to accept this for me. I formerly used FedEx and its on-site service because I am not at home during business hours. Despite the fact I was not at home, Wine 2 You graciously agreed to drop this off at my house. Otherwise I was going to send it back to you and ask for a refund! Given this problem, I'm not sure how I will or can be able to use Wine Spies in the future.

As a business, top marks. Excellent customer service, totally reliable performance, easy to use. As wine buyers, there’s a definite style that they lean into - just like any good wine shop.  You’re going to see a lot of big California reds and the EU picks are on the more fruit-forward side as well. If that is your jam (pardon the pun) then you’ll probably find plenty to like despite the low marketing profiles of many of thier producers. If your preference runs more towards the classic pre-Parker Euro style then you’ll probably want to stick to producers you know - you’ll see a Jaboulet, CVNE or similar pop up every couple of weeks but definitely lower frequency on those.

Review Title: A very informative and fun presentation…
Review Content: A very informative and fun presentation of the wine. The order is easy to place and the free shipping is a big plus.

I love Wine Spies for the access to high quality wines that have been vetted by their trustworthy agents at a great price. Whether it's a particular vintage that is harder to find, a region, a varietal, or winemaker - Wine Spies allow to explore, learn and develop my palate. Their locker system is awesome as you can store until you get a full case and they will ship at no charge.

Review Title: Really great selection of wines at…
Review Content: Really great selection of wines at great prices. Excellent customer service

Review Title: No better way to buy interesting wines!
Review Content: I love the offerings from Wine Spies. The prices are fair and the wines offered are unique and generally unavailable in my area. I love the descriptions provided. Finally, the wine locker feature is wonderful!

Review Title: The Wine Spies is an excellent tool for…
Review Content: The Wine Spies is an excellent tool for those looking to expand their horizons and explore wine that is outside their comfort zone. The choices are curated and preselected for both value and quality. The spymasters are trusted guides who will not steer you wrong.

I love WineSpies for the access they provide to high quality wines that have been vetted by their trustworthy agents. There's a story behind each wine that allows me to cherish the wine from different angles. Whether it's a particular vintage that is harder to find, a region, a varietal, or winemaker - WineSpies allows me to explore, learn and develop my palate. Their locker system is awesome too!

Review Title: Wine Spies delivers what they say!
Review Content: Wine Spies gives me the opportunity to purchase wines not available in my area. Sometimes they tend to make offerings from the same wineries often. But I do like the variety of styles and the occasional gems in their selections. Pricing is generally good overall.

Review Title: I enjoy the offerings I don’t like the…
Review Content: I enjoy the offerings I don’t like the sneaky 2nd wine offered almost implied once I’ve ordered the first. Misleading and bordering sleazy
Love this company. Have ordered 14 cases of wine from them. All great selections and for a great price. Love the Locker!

Wine Spies is a great way to try wines that may not be available in your local area. They provide a nice review and lots of good info to help you make your decision. Their locker system was a bit clunky to figure out in the beginning, but it allows you to buy a couple of bottles at a time and get free shipping when you get a case together. I generally check prices and reviews on other websites to compare and help me decide to buy.

FIVE STARS I LOVE the information you provide on the featured wine of the day, this gives me information about the winery, wine maker and wine itself. You provide fair prices and outstanding value. I have highly recommended your service to many friends and family members. Robert Williams in Ohio

I have been a customer for several years. WineSpies always has good values and almost every wine I have purchased has been outstanding. With their lockers program you can get free shipping without buying 12 bottles of the same wine and they will store your wine until you purchase 12 bottles - it could be as many as 12 different wines on 12 different dates. When the rare problem arises, they fix it within 24 hours.  This is simply the best wine service out there.

The best way to describe "Wines Spies"... an a la carte wine tour of the world. You peruse the daily selection based on their reviews and description of the wine and vintner. Choose your wine and/or price point, fill a case over time and ship at your leisure. No pressure or obligation.  I have yet to purchase a "bad" wine. I have regrettably purchased too few of an offering and longed for more.  Customer service is first rate. I have had the unfortunate experience of having a carrier damage the shipment. The CS team at Wine Spies responded within the hour of notification and resolved the issue without hesitation.

Review Title: WS is pretty good in securing out of…
Review Content: WS is pretty good in securing out of the ordinary wines. When it comes to widely marketed wines their prices are respectable but not at a significant discount that I can't find locally. The best values tend to come from overseas and I have yet to be disappointed. The locker feature is really nice and delivery is excellent.

Has become my go to method of buying great value wines. The variety available and being able to get wines that would not be available to me through normal means, make this a better option for me to get some very impressive wines.

The selection and price is both very good. Might want to get in a few more whites but other then that very good. Love that you will hold a case for a bit of time. Also like that you have a decent selection outside of nappa and a decent price range. Only problem we had was a broken case that was UPS problem not yours
Great product, reasonable prices, speedy delivery

Review Title: Has become my favorite way to purchase wine
Review Content: Love the model of daily offering with free shipment once I accumulate a case. So far I have purchased 4 cases (1-2 bottles at a time) and am working on my fifth. The offerings are excellent value and so far have not been disappointed. Most have been excellent

excellent program of buying slowly, knowing all there is to know when you chose a wine (ratings, etc), cellaring until you accumulate a case and the sending a case w/o additional fees....my favorite site

Review Title: Opportunity to buy hidden gems I've…
Review Content: Opportunity to buy hidden gems I've never heard of at great prices WITH SHIPPING INCLUDED!!! The vault option is superior, so I don't have to purchase a whole case at once. Descriptions are thorough and spot on. Highly recommend to anyone looking to try new varietals and wineries not available outside wine country.

The daily deals are great wines at great prices--I end up adding a few bottles to my case every week. When I've had questions or issues the service reps are responsive and friendly. I've referred friends and family who are now regular customers, as well!

Have been buying premium wines at great value. Mostly Red wines. Their reviews and suggestions are “ right on”. I have only had one bad experience with a rotten cork bottle from France, and they credited the cost back with a courteous response. I will continue to buy and build case lockers for Free Shipment. Summary: Very happy customer!

Review Title: Overall, Very Happy with The Wine Spies
Review Content: Overall, Very Happy with Wine Spies - I like the locker concept and free shipping when locker ships; Majority of wine offers are good. Web site works well. My problem is missing out on offers - too late - not sitting waiting for next offer. On My last locker order there was a warehouse shipping issue - I had to email and ask - when will my locker ship - it was sitting in Processing for a week. They investigated - apologized and admitted the order had an issue and was sitting in warehouse/shipping. They resolved the issue and told me it would ship the next day - and it did.

I have been a member of Wine Spies for a few years. I have been more active since the addition of the locker. You can decide what wine you want to purchase and put in your locker and when you get a case the wine ships free. And the prices, oh my the prices! You can purchase some high level Napa Cab's for a fraction of the original winery price. My wife and I have been to Napa and Sonoma every year since 2010 except 2020 (COVID-19 and I had to grow my hair long again) and we belong to several wine clubs. Wine Spies gives us the option to purchase wine from wineries we have not been to but wanted to go to. Wine Spies you are the best.
the daily choices of wines you never hear of, the prices being charged, the ease of ordering, and the locker storage until wanted is 4 great features about Wine Spies
Wine Spies brings exceptional value with accurate descriptions of the wine they share!

Review Title: Love the concept of the wine locker
Review Content: Love the concept of the wine locker. I buy single bottles to try different wines and do not have to pay shipping once I fill my locker with 12 bottles. I am also have ample time to research a given offering comfortably to decide on what I would like to purchase.

Review Title: Been a customer for maybe 15 years
Review Content: Been a customer for maybe 15 years. We've bought more wine than I might care to admit, usually 2 cases a month. My wife and I both have accounts. She buys the weeknight wines and I buy the stuff for the cellar. The Wine Spies help you get exposed to a breadth of wines you normally would never be aware of. The prices are great.
