The lockers are great. On more that one occasion I have built a locker of premium wines and had it shipped to our rental home when vacationing and it was waiting for us on our arrival. And I have NEVER had a problem with their customer service. On the rare occasion you have to bring something to their attention they always make it right.
One of my favorite places to purchase wine. It's the place to get good to great deals, small wineries that you won't find their wine in the wine/liquor store, and wonderful customer service.
While the selection is always limited, the prices are aggressive and the service excellent.

Review Title: Always look forward to next review
Review Content: Ever since I’ve been a member, I’ve been greatly entertained by the wine reviews and comprehensive background of the winery and winemaker - definitely exposes you to different names and appellations and ultimately allows little trials without a heavy 6 or 8 bottle requirement, and then when you hit your 12-bottle triggers it’s like a bonus prize when the case gets sent. I’ve learned a lot and have had some amazing wines! Super happy with this daily diversion Wish they would ship with website review as over time can become forgetful

Review Title: Lack of communication and customer service
Review Content: I have purchased 4 lockers of wine since last May and I need to purchase one more bottle to complete a 5th locker. Up until this January, I was happy with the wines and your business model. However, I am still waiting for my last complete locker which I requested to be shipped back on January 13th. Apparently, there are issues with the timing of the trucks and shipments and one bottle was damaged so the whole locker was returned. However, the only way I found out about all of this was by reaching out to you. Nobody from Winespies has kept me informed about the issues with shipping this locker. I am very concerned about the condition of the wines included in this delayed locker shipment as the wines have supposedly been sitting on a truck for almost a month. I am still waiting to hear when it will be shipped. The lack of customer service and communication is very frustrating. I need to purchase one more bottle to get free shipping on a locker. However, after that, I will have to seriously think about whether I will purchase any more bottles from your website.

Lovely selection, generally deals are pretty good and often do represent some of the best prices I can locate (though admittedly they often appear much greater in % reduction, meaning to say you can find very similar prices or only slightly higher prices elsewhere). My favorite part of their service is the willingness to hold your wine until you have purchased 12 bottles and then ship it without a fee. Moreover they offer temperature controlled shipping where I live, which is a big deal to me in trying to keep wine in good condition when I intend to age it for some time at home. Really great service all around and continue to recommend to people I know.

I like the way that you can buy what you find interesting and have it stored in a locker until you get a case, then have it shipped for free. I enjoy the wines, the wines have been extraordinary. the lowest I gave to maybe two wines I selected was average, most are outstanding. I recommend you look at Gray Ghost. it is a small vineyard in Amissville Va...excellent wines. Though I doubt they would sell to you. Their cabernet's are excellent, their reserve Cab is to die for.  good luck

Review Title: Wine selection is at very good prices…
Review Content: Wine selection is at very good prices and the hidden gems are a plus. But the best service is the wine locker feature. Just received my first case and am very pleased. Already working on my second.

These folks are great. They come across some great deals and will hold smaller purchases until you have enough stored to ship for free!!! No more being forced into buying 6 of something you may not like just to get free shipping!

Review Title: It's a very interesting concept and…
Review Content: It's a very interesting concept and I've been intrigued by it for some time. I love the options of getting some perhaps obscure region wines . . .but the absolute best thing are the Lockers. Best concept yet.

Review Title: I got a very nice wine i was wanting to…
Review Content: I got a very nice wine i had been wanting to drink for a while. The price was right and had no issue on website or delivery. All easy!!

Review Title: Have ordered from Wine Spies for years…
Review Content: Have ordered from Wine Spies for years and have never been disappointed. The storage locker and climate controlled shipping are great features.

Review Title: Cannot Wait to Fill My Locaker
Review Content: I have had four cases delivered so far and am working on my fifth! This site is fantastic for wines shipped to your home. You might not spend less on wine, but you're going to drink much better wine for the money. As a former wine distributor, I know my wines. Wine Spies offers some of the top wines from around the world, at great prices. But the little known gems they come up with is the silver lining. The wine locker feature could really be the best feature. Buy twelve bottles in any combination, over any period of time. Once you get to twelve they ship it for free!
Wine spies is the best. They Provide Great Wine at a low cost. Also I like the locker feature so I can save the shipping fee.
Good deals. Locker feature makes it easy to buy what you like. Convenient buying experience.

Review Title: Wine Spies offers the best wine prices…
Review Content: Wine Spies offers the best wine prices online. Love the storage locker feature, once it fills they ship for free!!

Review Title: Wines spies is a good concept
Review Content: Wines spies is a good concept, but shipping is horrible. I asked to have my locker shipped weeks ago, and nothing. I call, and go straight to voicemail! I think I’m done with  wine spies! I’ll go back to Vivino, which is as good.

Review Title: Just started ordering from Wine Spies…
Review Content: Just started ordering from Wine Spies and never heard of a wine locker theory before this opportunity. It works well and saves on shipping for every class purchased with discounts. Just think the discounts could be better as compared to Vivino where you can order less and still get free shipping. Also would like to have more variety to order from if possible with additional savings.

I generally have loved the wines I receive from Wine Spies. Two weeks ago, I entered an order to have a locker shipped.  It has been in process since. I believe there were similar delays in the last couple orders.  Initially when I ordered from Wine Spies the shipments were amazingly fast. Not sure what is causing the delay. I also noticed that the zip code was incorrect on my order (my fault, just recently moved and used the old zip). I have sent three requests to have this changed but it still shows as incorrect on the order. This adds additional delay to an already very slow shipping process.

Review Title: Delivery seems to be an issue.
Review Content: The selection of wine is very good. Delivery is another issue. I have been waiting for over a week to get a case of wine that I purchased over the last 3 weeks.
Love the locker concept, accumulating purchases for free shipping. Love the shipping options

Review Title: The best part of Wine Spies is the Locker System!
Review Content: Amazing descriptions of the wines that make them so tempting!! The best part of this whole thing is the locker system! I love being able to claim one bottle at a time and it builds the anticipation for when I hit the 12 bottles and it ships for free! I can’t wait to get there and receive my first case!
I love the locker concept. I’m a “wine for normal people” follower. They turned me on to you. Thank you Elizabeth! Jim M

Review Title: Ordered my first case and just received…
Review Content: Ordered my first case and just received last night and had to open a bottle to make sure it was what was advertised and we were very happy with the first bottle and looking forward to the rest of the bottles. Also there customer service is also 5 star as I had an issue that was resolved better than expected. Great Job

Review Title: I have been a member of various wine…
Review Content: I have been a member of various wine clubs for years, most of which represented more international wines than domestics. I have ordered my first four cases and anxiously awaiting. I will follow up later.
I appreciate free shipping on 12 bottles, but I really think you should give consideration to repeat buyers and reduce to 6 bottles so we can get our wine quicker

90%+ of the wine I've purchased through Wine Spies has been of very good quality. Ordering is simple and I very much like the locker arrangement where you can buy, and then wait until you have a full case before shipping.

Review Title: The write ups on each wine offering is…
Review Content: The write ups on each wine offering is terrific. Spot on as well with the honesty in sharing the nuances and flavors for what each wine offers. I'm a buttery chardonnay gal (friends prefer cabs) and have ordered enough cases of both that I have rarely been disappointed in my purchases. I also love the convenience of having the cases delivered right to my home. I've been using your services for years and will continue to do so.
I ordered a case of wine 2 days ago. I did not understand the process and gave a weak review. They were on top of it immediately. I applaud their response and am now a repeat customer

Review Title: Easy to Use and Great Products
Review Content: Extremely easy process for ordering, storage, shipping. Great mix of well-known brands and under the radar labels. Pricing is great too.
Great way to get really good deals on exceptional wines. I love that you can buy less than a case and put them into your locker until you have a case to ship.

I have purchased several cases so far. Really like the under-the-radar finds they offer. When we visit wine country we always want to go to small, family owned wineries to find wines not available in stores. Wine Spies is the perfect solution for us without traveling there. Sure, I'd like to see more white blends, more Sonoma and Central Coast, but I'm definitely staying with these folks as a customer.

Review Title: Great site to find high quality wines…
Review Content: Great site to find high quality wines at a discount. The locker feature is great to be able to buy individual wines and store them until you have enough for a case free shipment.

In theory, the concept of filling a case and shipping on that full case with no shipping cost, is a great idea. In practice, it is taking me along time to fill that case - so I've spent the $ but still waiting on the wine - now the main reason for that is I only drink whites in the summer and I have found the white wine offerings to be much less than the reds. I do love Growers Champagnes so when they come around I try to buy. I'm slowly getting to my case, but it's taking what I perceive to be a long time.

I have purchased 4 lockers from Winespies, first 2 shipments styrofoam was broken & cracked all over, box looked reused, bottles were hitting each other, one shipment was missing a bottle, but they made it right, last 2 perfect! All wine arrived safely, so far no bad wines. Highly recommend.

I love buying this way. I'm the only one in my household that enjoys wine so using the locker works great for me. I can buy 1 or 2 bottles at a time and put in my locker for later, avoiding high shipping charges. I highly recommend.
Fantastic site and options. The cellar sticker was great and love the locker option. I check it everyday! Thanks Wine Spies.

I’ve loved Wine Spies ever since discovering them. Awesome offers and exceptional customer service. The site is very user friendly and adds an educational component which is great for exploratory wine drinkers. Highly recommend them to anyone I talk to regarding wine.

Big Wine Spies fan! Yeah, you can buy wine from the big stores, Costco, Total Wine, Binny's and get great deals, but you can't get the boutique wines of limited cases and no middle man costs. Majority of the time, you will find it here at the lowest cost, but I've done my homework and they usually are the most competitive. The biggest win in the past few years is the lockers, you don't need to buy 6 or 12 to get free shipping of that one bottle. You can purchase 1 at a time to get to a case and get that free shipping. Customer service via email has been great with any issues.

Never had a chance to deal with them much as I've had log in problems. Had to reset my passwords 2-3 times and still cannot access my account. If you search the site you will see they have no phone number to call to reach out for help. No e:mail either, but a form you can fill out. I did receive one response and was able to respond to that. Did so 2 or 3 times and received no response. Tried to cancel my order and could not. So reached out to my credit card company to cancel payment. May be a great site, but they never allowed me to find out and their customer service sucks.

Review Title: Great Wines - But Not All Discounted
Review Content: I've used Wine Spies for a number of years. If you know what you are buying, you get a great discount on great wines. I've personally visited many of the vineyards, and for those wines, I know with certainty that you are getting a discount. I've also found a lot of great wines by experimenting with regions and varietals that I'm familiar with. However, with some wines, the "discount" is illusory - online searches show that those wines are the same price everywhere, or sometimes cheaper. Just worth noting if you are taking a chance on something.

I purchased my first bottle (a Grich Hills Zin) in 2009 and have never been disappointed. The addition of the locker feature a few years ago was a great idea. Another great feature is the ability to look back over those 13 years and see every bottle ever purchased! A bit of an embarrassment when I see what I've spent, but a great tool to track my favorites. 100% love these guys!

I have bought almost 3 cases of wine now on Wine Spies and just really love the concept....especially the vault shipping as it might take me a month or even 6 months to put a case together. Every day there is a new selection or two to review and I love getting the emails to see what's in the day's offer. I can wait until I find a bottle that matches my particular taste. Some bottles are crazy good deals and others are more what you'd find as regular retail. Do a little research and enjoy the "fruits" of the labor.

Review Title: My favorite part about Wine Spies is…the LOCKER!
Review Content: My favorite part about Wine Spies is the locker. I love that I can buy wine and then wait to have it shipped until my locker is full. I don’t tend to buy cases of a specific wine, so the locker feature is perfect. I get a case of a variety of wines. It’s awesome!

Review Title: We have been getting wine from the Wine…
Review Content: We have been getting wine from the Wine Spies for many years. We have gotten great deals on a variety of wines, from everyday table wine to Cabernets meant to cellar. I appreciate the write up and tech notes on the website.  I like the locker option. It allows us to buy a few of the more expensive wines without paying for shipping. I had one experience of not receiving a box of wine, due to shipping problems. The shipping company noted that we received the wine but we had not. I was able to speak directly to someone at Wine Spies and they took care of it immediately.  I appreciate good customer service as well as great wine!

Review Title: I have a medium sized wine cellar of…
Review Content: I have a medium sized wine cellar of about 40 cases. I source bottles from wineries who's clubs I've joined, costco and assorted wine stores. Wine Spies is by far the largest on line source of wines for me. I have recommended them to friends and family. I like that they get wines from a wide array of sources and sell them at very competitive prices. They are perfect for maintaining a well stocked, and varied cellar. Wine Spies locker feature is great so you can purchase bottles that appeal to you and they ship for free when you get a case. Their service is problem free and their customer service is very good. I've purchased from them for about four years.
I've been a member of several clubs including First Leaf, WSJ Wines, Laithwaites, to name a few and Wine Spies is by far the best. Buy what you want, when you want at INSANE discounts. Love it!!!!!

Review Title: I love buying from Wine Spies
Review Content: I love buying from Wine Spies. Selection and pricing are great. I especially like the locker. That is a great service no matter what you storage capabilities are. Being able to ship for free when you fill up you case is a great deal. Great customer service too. I had a shipment go missing and Wine Spies sent me another immediately while they tracked the first one down.

Review Title: The locker concept is a great ideal and…
Review Content: The locker concept is a great ideal and a real convenience for apartment dwellers who have no room for cellars as well as those on a budget who are prohibited from making online purchases because of the shining cost.
Generally good service - and fun wines

Great company. I’ve been purchasing wine through Wine Spies for approximately a year and I’ve been happy with how they do business. It’s rare that anyone undersells them when they offer a wine. They offer many boutique wines that I have difficulty finding at any local store. I like the feature where they’ll store the wine and let you decide when to ship. And I find the write-ups on the wines accurate and amusing at times, which I appreciate. I’ll admit I was a bit hesitant to make my first purchase due to the lack of transparency of the individual(s) behind the company. That’s probably because I’m older and prefer to know the individuals I’m dealing with. I still wish they would give the names of the people you deal with and perhaps even have a write-up about them. But other than that, I have nothing but positive things to say and recommend doing business with them.

Review Title: I enjoy the wide variety of wines…
Review Content: I enjoy the wide variety of wines offered and I particularly enjoy the ability to stick them in a locker and ship when I get a full case. I have never had a problem getting the proper wines and having them shipped timely. Keep up the good work!! It is valuable to have the technical data and winery information on the particular wines as well.

Solid offerings daily. Great opportunities for Napa Cabs that are well priced and hard to find. Ships fast. Takes around a week or so once it ships. Never had an issue with getting the product in great condition. Enjoy shopping this site.

Review Title: I’ve been with Wine spies Since the…
Review Content: I’ve been with Wine spies Since the beginning, I love to get wines that I can’t buy in Kansas or Missouri. The last shipment from the anniversary special had some terrific bottles of red wine. I need another case of wine just like the last one. The two things I use the most are the lockers and Reading how many months the bottles were aged in the winery description. I want my red wine to taste like splinters.

Love/Hate relationship with Wine Spies. I HATE that I am spending all my money on wine because I have no will power to not purchase something every week! I highly recommend this site. If you are a casual wine drinker or a collector this site is great. Some deals are amazing and those are the ones I see typically sell out faster and are going to have a higher price point. Be sure to do some research however as some "deals" are not must buys as you can find it priced the same on a regular basis. I do wish there were more promo codes especially for frequent purchasers. The locker storage option is great. They also offer a $20 Vault surprise bottle. It's more of a fun thing to do then any real value as I've yet to really get a bottle that was more than $15-$25 retail. They claim to send out more expensive bottles but I've yet to get one in the 10+ times I've purchased. It is a fun way to buy a wine you may not have otherwise purchased. I would give 5 Stars, but I still do not understand the shipping and tracking process. The website could be improved to provide better tracking and more updates. Typically it takes 10-14 days in my experience to receive a delivery after you ship a completed vault. Give them a shot!

There are several things I really like about Wine Spies .... the locker concept is genius. I hate, absolutely hate paying for shipping - and the locker is the perfect solution. I love the in-depth reviews - often reading about the winery or the winemaker or the family is what makes me want to try their wines. I also like to buy 1 or maybe 2 bottles, so I can try many different wines - again, the locker let's me do that yet avoid shopping. Highly recommend!!

Disappointed. They don't ship your lockers as promised. They say 2 business days on their site and here we are 5 business days later and still not shipped. Customer service only says they "expect" to ship it in 24 to 48 MORE hours.

Review Title: Great informative reviews of the wines…
Review Content: Great informative reviews of the wines they represent. I recommend watching it for a while before you just jump after every deal. Once you have a good feel for spotting a truly great deal--epic finds--i do then recommend jumping. I lost on a few really good finds that I assumed I had a little time to consider.

Review Title: Been using Wine Spies for about 18…
Review Content: Been using Wine Spies for about 18 months. Have secured several great deals and stocked my cellar with some delicious wine. Customer service has been good, shipping is a bit slow at times, but they always deliver as promised. Not every deal is as awesome as the online copy would lead you to believe; always check against an internet search- there have been a few wines that were priced similarly at some big box liquor stores to the 40% off claims on Wine Spies. Overall a very good site, but beware of the overhype at times.

Review Title: Wine Spies is the BEST OF THE BEST
Review Content: Wine Spies is the BEST OF THE BEST! Such great deals and such great PRICES!!!!!!!

Review Title: Thrilled I found The Wine Spies.
Review Content: So thankful a friend turned me on to The Wine Spies. No where else can I get access to such great wines at insanely good deals. Their locker service is such a great idea. A friendly, knowledgeable, and helpful staff rounds out the experience.

Review Title: Wine Spies is a great site
Review Content: Wine Spies is a great site. Wines of all quality levels and price points. We know what we like and have found very good values.

I love the Locker concept. I grab one or two or three or four bottles of wine depending... When there's 12 in there - free shipping! I've really only not loved one purchase. I see no reason to buy wine any other way - unless you find one you love and can buy cases for the same cost.

This has become my go-to wine supplier. Excellent wines at very good prices. The locker feature, which allows you to purchase bottles but have them held until you fill a case (saving on shipping) is great. Responsive customer service. In the rare cases where I’ve had a bad bottle or problems with a particular shipper, WS stepped in and solved the problem. Really great company.

Review Title: Great wines and great customer service!
Review Content: Great wines and great customer service. Not sure what else you could ask for. Wine lockers are a total game changer for folks that can’t (or just prefer not to) buy cases of wine at one go! One of the wines in my first order was great! Like in my top 5 ever! Another was just ok, but that’s just wine and another great thing about not needing to buy a case with ever purchase!

Review Title: Excellent way to discover new vineyards and vintages the world over...but really a Rosé?
Review Content: I've been a Wine Spies subscriber for at least five years, and overall it has been a very positive experience--a relatively economical and enjoyable way of finding new [red] wines. I can highly recommend the experience to anyone interested in exploring new vineyards and vintages--the Wine Spies are generally excellent, but not flawless, curators.  I want to provide some additional feedback for them--I assume that they read their reviews. They recently introduced a "feature", which is purchase individual bottles from their "vault", without going into too much detail, it's a system that allows a subscriber to purchase a "pot luck" wine from the Wine Spies library---sounds like an interesting idea, right?, but they need to work on their algorithm--I have never purchased anything but red wines from Wine Spies [I only pay attention to Agent Red], and for the first wine that I purchased from their "vault", they sent me a Rosé[!]---someone is not paying attention.

Have been with Wine Spies for 8 months. Pros : +build a case over time  +free shipping on date  that you select  +daily descriptives that never fail to amuse ! Cons : Too many Cabs from  obscure vintners

Review Title: I have ordered several cases over the…
Review Content: I have ordered several cases over the past few years. The fact that the wines will be stored in a locker and then shipped when full or at my desire is hugely helpful. Especially to avoid shipping during very hot summer months. Great customer service as well for the few things I have had to inquire about.

Excellent selection and pricing on every offer each day. Adding a few bottles to my LOCKER and then allowing me to wait to ship based on my needs is a great program. The site is easy to navigate and all the detail they provide on each wine makes it easy to make good decisions. I recommend this site to all me wine friends.

I love shopping and buying from The Wine Spies. Not only is the wine that they offer top quality, but it’s a great price and just darn fun! Plus, I’ve had wine accidentally broken by UPS/Fed Ex in transit and the customer service at Wine Spies is top notch! They always take care of me and treat me great!

Review Title: One of my favorite wine purveyors
Review Content: Everything really well priced, great diversity of wines, and some real gems. Love the feature where you can buy a few bottles here, more there, and let them add up until you have a full case and it ships free.

Review Title: My first case was worth the risk!
Review Content: Trying a new wine club always feels like a risk. I ordered my first case from Wine Spies and I am quite pleased with my first five bottles (both quality and value). If the rest of this case and the next one maintain the same quality level, I’ll likely switch my wine buying over completely.

Review Title: Overall very happy with Wine Spies
Review Content: Overall very happy with Wine Spies, although they make it too easy to click and buy! The only complaint I have is that the wine boxes always seem to be flimsy on the bottom, and have to hold it because it feels like it may break through.

Truly horrific wine and worthless customer support. Purchased 3 bottles of 2009 vintage Mica Wine. Opened one bottle, and it was undrinkable. Wrote to customer support seeking my account be credited. Apparently WS credited my account for one bottle of the 3 I purchased and said to open another bottle. Did that, bottle 2 equally bad as bottle 1. Again tried to seek credit but this time haven’t received any response from WS and sent two follow up emails. Zip, no response from WS. Lesson learned, moving on. WS sells bad, undrinkable wine and my experience was extremely poor and cannot recommend.

Review Title: My favorite thing about Wine Spies is…
Review Content: My favorite thing about Wine Spies is that you can buy a bottle or two and they will keep them until you have purchased a case of wine and then ship for free.

Good wine, good variety, good info, and good price! Have had nothing but a great experience shopping with Winespies for the past 2 years. Locker system with shipping included is what makes this site work well for my needs.

Review Title: Quality wines and Good Customer Service
Review Content: Quality wines at competitive prices, locker options, ease of communication with Agents. Ease of online orders  Got some great Bordeaux, Burgundy and Californian wines. Most of our guests for wine tasting liked Sullivan and Frank family wines.

Review Title: Nobody does it better…Roger Moore would be proud.
Review Content: Wine Spies has been a great source of emerging and small batch wines to augment my cellar. The selections track with my tastes and included preferences.

I have been working with Winespies now for a bit over 2 years. My interactions with them has been excellent. The wines have been excellent and the service always spot on. The marketing is great too!!! Keep up the great work!

Review Title: Strongly recommend Wine Spies to purchase wine 🍷
Review Content: Good reviews on wine, great prices, love the lockers / free shipping. I have been buying wine from Wine Spies for over four years and have never been disappointed with a purchase. Sometimes I check vineries website and verify savings. Great way to buy wine. Good values on older vintages as well. Thank you Wine Spies
Love that I can store my wine until I get a case of wine, that ships for free. Love the range and quality of the wines offered, and of course the prices are reasonable.

Review Title: The wine selection and prices are…
Review Content: The wine selection and prices are mostly great! The website used to be clunky, especially managing lockers but is vastly improved. I wish they would bring back the app. That was a much more convenient way to shop.

I have loved this site from the very beginning. Also have been extremely happy with most of my purchases. (here and there a wine I don't love, but will still drink ) I think the descriptions provided for each wine have been accurate and very helpful in deciding what to purchase. LOVE the lockers, and the customer service is awesome as well.

great place to buy wine. the ability to buy a couple of bottles at a time and add them to your locker is fantastic. once your locker has 12 bottles it ships free. they find some very small production gems that I would never get to drink if not for the savvy Agents.

I love shopping for wine on the wine spies website. Every day there’s a new and interesting winery to learn about and the discounts are amazing. The lockers feature is wonderful as it allows me to buy one or two bottles and save them for a case shipment later with free shipping. They’re very well packaged and I’ve not had problems with breakage during shipment. Great customer service, too.
Great site, one of the best. Fantastic functionality and options of use. Cheers.
I like Wine Spies to sample wine from wineries that I’m not familiar with, especially those from Oregon, Washington and foreign countries. I really like the vault system that ships cases for free.

I love wine spies and have gone through almost 100 bottles from their site. Only two I have not liked but everything else has been fantastic. I also get a bottle out of the vault in each order and have received some very good wine including H Block.

Review Title: Great Approach, but Do your Research
Review Content: You have to do your research on the offered wines, but by-in-large I've been very satisfied with the products. I love the locker approach and the access to less common wines. A few misses (like the mystery vault purchases), but mostly hits.

Review Title: Great Website if you do your research
Review Content: They have some really good deals. During the pandemic, they had great bargains on a lot of boutique Napa wines. Now that the pandemic is over, they still get some good deals every now and again but not nearly as often. The Lockers is great, buy a few bottles at a time and when you get a case, they ship for free. That alone is a game changer.

Great wine for the price. Bought a variety of cabs for my wife for Mother’s Day. She loves the wine, it’s wine we would never buy because of the price. The UPS delivery wasn’t great, no tracking and when they said it would be delivered it was a day later, wouldn’t be bad if you didn’t have to sign for it …waited around 2 days. But the wine so far has been great.

Review Title: Discovered Winespies about a year ago
Review Content: Discovered Winespies about a year ago, I have been very pleased with wines and the process. Especially like the Locker feature. The quality of the wines has been outstanding.

Review Title: Wine spies offers a great selection of wines!
Review Content: Wine spies offers a great selection of wines at fantastic prices? What I like best is the ability to store wine in a locker until 12 bottles are accumulated and then they ship for free!
Good product and concept. Suggestion, offer a few Amarone's
Excellent selection of wine at reasonable prices.

Review Title: I've been using Wine Spies for years
Review Content: I've been using Wine Spies for years. Being able to purchase great wine at a discount is great but another advantage is most of these wines are not available anywhere else. The Lockers feature was definitely a game changer for me, I went from an occasional user of the service to Wine Spies being my go to first wine company.

Great concept. Buy wine at a great price and they will store it and ships once a full case with free shipping. Rare finds at great prices. I have been very happy with my purchases as I average 12 cases a year.

Wine spies is fantastic. They consistently offer a wide variety of quality wines at good prices, the locker service saves on shipping costs and enables you to slowly build up 2 cases before they get sent to you, so you dont get deliveries of just a few bottles at a time. Highly recommend them.

Review Title: Love being able to try 1-3 bottles of…
Review Content: Love being able to try 1-3 bottles of something new and just having them hold in locker until case is complete. Reviews and tasting profiles are generally accurate and I’ve had no disappointments over few years now.

Review Title: Great wine, lotta fun, no hassle!
Review Content: I’ve ordered a lot of great wine from Wine Spies over the last 5 years. It’s a fun experience: entertaining education, top-notch service, good value, and satisfying cases at my doorstep. They are my go-to site for daily wine offerings in part because they are well-connected with excellent producers. Love the lockers feature!

Review Title: Have picked up some good wine at a good…
Review Content: Have picked up some good wine at a good price here. Service is excellent and consistent.  Will be using them more. Steve

We love Wine Spies! Always have a great selection & the write ups are the best, really gives good background on the region s & the winemakers. One of the best features for us are the lockers, you can try a few bottles of something, store in a locker until the case is full & then they ship (free) to your door. Try it for a great way to experience some new wines.
Easy to shop with compelling value and selection. It’s a treasure hunt appeal

I have been purchasing wines from the Wine Spies for almost 10-years. They always have great deals and inspiring narratives to explain their wines and their respective pedigrees. I have even returned one or two wine purchases with no questions and a full refund. Their recent website changes and locker ordering process upgrade has been great. Check them out. Love these guys….

There are lots of things I like about Wine Spies...access to different wines I probably can't get locally, very good deals on a lot of those wines, and some amusingly over-the-top reviews of wines that they're pitching on a particular day. I also like the ability to buy just a couple of bottles here and there, have them stored until I have a full case, and then get them shipped to me (for free!). Only drawback, as far as I have experienced, is that shipping can at times take an extremely long time (read: several months) after the request to ship is made. Sometimes it happens right away, sometimes in a number of months. If they can iron that issue out, then my review goes from 4 stars to 5.
I buy wine from Wine Spies on a regular basis. Superb choice and reviews. Prices speak for themselves. Every day I see wines I would enjoy buying. The wine locker is a great idea.
Website easy to use. Prices are competitive and sometimes the best. Wide range of wines to choose from.

Review Title: One of the best online wine merchants
Review Content: Great prices on a diverse array of wines. Being able to assemble cases of wine rather than shipping every single purchase is a HUGE plus.

This has been a wonderful find for me. You pick the wines, you decide when to buy and when not to. What a tremendous collection of wines to pick from. Highly rated at amazing prices. Using lockers (free) to hold your single bottle orders until you have a full case to get free shipping is a big benefit.  100% support Wine Spies!
Nice wines, and good - sometimes even great - prices!

Review Title: I buy most of my wine from Wine Spies
Review Content: I buy most of my wine from Wine Spies. Great wine selection at attractive prices. Love the locker system as a way save on shipping. You guys are the best online wine retailers out there. Also, your customer service is very responsive.
Excellent wines at very attractive prices. The locker system is very helpful, allowing you to save the shipping cost and offers an opportunity for free storage of the new bottles.

Review Title: Hoping WS will also carry Natural wines
Review Content: Solid selection of conventional wines at wallet-friendly prices. Would be awesome if WS offered natural wines as well! Then I wouldn't have to go to MYSA and Primal Wines for 0̷0̷/low-intervention juice.

Review Title: Please offer us more French white wine
Review Content: This offers many nice California wines. However as a person who likes French white wine there really are not an off a lot of options for me.

Great service Excellent prices on limited/hard-to-find wines. Lockers are a killer feature as is the new websites ease of use. I am probably 10 cases in here and haven’t been displeased with any of the wines.
I buy 95% of my wine from Wine Spies. Great selection with detailed reviews (with fun humor, my favorite)—locker shipping is great! Excellent customer service—highly recommend!

Review Title: My go to site for quality wine.
Review Content: I've never had a bad experience with Wine Spies. I can always trust receiving quality wine from them. Once you are ready to ship, Wine Spies delivers in a very reasonable time frame.

Review Title: The Wine Spies (TWS) is my primary source for wine purchases!
Review Content: The Wine Spies (TWS) is my primary source for wine purchases. TWS always provides detailed reviews of the wines sold that are spot on. I always feel I am getting a great price. I understand the focus on California wines but would like to see more wines from Washington and Oregon. Full disclosure, I live in Oregon.
Great selection...great prices. The Locker is the real deal. Going on 2 years WS customer.
Love the locker feature and new featured wine each day with no obligations.

I love this site! My wife and I have picked up many high end Napa wines! Their prices are excellent, and I love the locker storage until cases are filled. The free shipping is a huge plus. I have recommended this site to numerous people. Plan on buying from them for many years to come!

Review Title: Love this company’s concept but looking for more random variety.
Review Content: Love the way this company works. The locker feature is really great. The vault purchase is really cool. I the wines are predominantly red and I like red but I also like white for variety and would like to see more of those.  Still working on filling my first case but I look forward to getting it and trying these awesome wines.

Review Title: The best thing is the vault
Review Content: The best thing is the vault. I can buy as many bottles as I want, try new things, risk a little. Because I know they would keep my wine and send it to me for free. The selection is good. I’d like to have more international wines, but so far what I’ve tasted is good, and really great prices. Keep the wine coming!!

Review Title: Great selection of wine at a great value
Review Content: Great selection of wine at a great value

I have been purchasing wine from WS for several years and will continue to do so for many many more. Quality is unmatched. Selection is awesome - reds, whites, Napa, Italy, France, Spain, etc …. Anything you want, WS has it. Price is unbelievable. I simply cannot get the price locally for the same quality and selection. Service is great. I’m a lifer!!
Have enjoyed everything I've purchased. Love the locker idea.

Review Title: Wine Spice offers a great product…
Review Content: Wine Spice offers a great product quality with affordable prices. In other word, win win choice.

I've been buying from WS for over a year and will remain a long-term customer. The selections, prices, and service are all excellent with few exceptions. I purchased two selections (3 bottles each) which had corkage/seal problems and 100% credit was applied to my account within minutes of my reporting. The write-ups are entertaining and accurate and make buying good wine fun and educational and not stuffy. If you are stuffy, please buy your wine at twice the price somewhere else and leave more here on WS for the fun people. Thank you.

Great selection of wines across all price points, but especially in the $30-50 range. Nice mix with older vintages sometimes available. Love the locker concept. You can buy one or more bottles from a given offering and then house them in your "locker. When your locker reaches a case you receive free shipping. No one wants to pay for shipping. Lastly, love the $20 mystery bottle option. I have received some great bottles for a fraction of their cost. Opening up the mystery bottle is great fun when your case arrives!!
